title: Ores++
description:
This mod pack adds various new ores, most of which include their own set of tools and armour.

This pack also includes backpacks which will help you carry around all the new exciting ores with ease!
body:
This mod pack includes hundreds of various new ores to the game, each with their own set of tools and armour, these items get greater in power as the rarity rises.
This modpack also contains some peformance mods such as embeddium and modern fix.
There are a few more small mods to make the overall experience more enjoyablle.
Also contains better combat mod to make fighting with the new items more emmersive.
